## Testing

- [ ] `node --check sidepanel.js`
- [ ] `node --check content_script.js`
- [ ] `node --check service_worker.js`
- [ ] Loaded unpacked extension in Chrome
- [ ] Tested record and replay manually

## Product impact

Does this keep the default workflow simple?

```text
Record once -> Test once -> Schedule -> Notify
```

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No arbitrary remote JavaScript execution
- [ ] No default page-content upload
- [ ] No bypass of CAPTCHA, 2FA, or anti-fraud controls
